revision.comment: [[User:Michey.M]]さんの家系図の画像[[File:Creation myths of Japan 4.svg]]を模したパレット式テンプレート
とりあえずbelowに出典追加。ほんとは1939年版の世界大百科事典2版よりも、もっと信頼性の高い専門書の情報源を記載した方がいいと思われ。

Created page with "{{Navbox | name = Izanami-firebirths | title = {{ill|Deities Born from Izanami’s Birth of Kagutsuchi|ja|神産み#カグツチ|lt=Gods Born from Izanami’s Birth of Kagutsuchi}} | listclass = | state = uncollapsed | below = '''Source''': {{Cite web2 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E8%BB%BB%E9%81%87%E7%AA%81%E6%99%BA-227849#E4.B8.96.E7.95.8C.E5.A4.A7.E7.99.BE.E7.A7.91.E4.BA.8B.E5.85.B8.20.E7.AC.AC.EF.BC.92.E7.89.88 |title=From "Fire" |author={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡..."
Text replacement - "豊受大神宮}}" to "豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}"
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:S Related to Shinto]]
5 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:Template:Izanami-firebirths up to rev 99647257
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
